education.institution: City College of New York of the City University of New York

experience.title: Information Technology Specialist II
experience.description: Developed and maintained IT (systems) written in LINC, COBOL, Java, Struts, PL/SQL, and XML. Analyzed and developed complex business intelligence reports to meet the needs of internal and external stakeholders.

experience.title: Intern Application Developer
experience.description: Maintained the support system to provide services to the clients. Developed program logic for new applications, analyzed and modified logic in existing applications.

experience.title: Intern iOS Developer
experience.description: Designed and built applications for the iOS platform. Ensured the performance, quality, and responsiveness of applications.
